sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String);
UPDATE test_table SET value = toString(toDecimal256OrDefault(value, 2, CAST('0', 'Decimal256(2)'))) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT toDecimal256OrDefault(value, 2, CAST('-1', 'Decimal256(2)')) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, toTypeName(toDecimal256OrDefault(value, 3)) AS value_type FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
